description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a light gray surface and four sturdy legs, accompanied by a matching office chair with a high backrest and rolling casters. On the desk, there is a black adjustable desk lamp, a pink pencil holder with pens, a small wooden mannequin figure, and a set of four upright books held by a white bookend. A small potted succulent plant sits on one corner, and a sheet of paper is placed near the center. The desk appears to be made primarily of wood or engineered wood with a smooth, matte finish, and the chair is constructed from similar materials with a cushioned seat and back. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for a workspace or study area. The objects on the desk are arranged neatly, suggesting an organized and clean environment.
description: A modern light gray desk with a matching office chair, featuring a desk lamp, books, a plant, and stationery arranged neatly on its surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the desk, chair, books, lamp, plant, and all desktop items clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lamp, books, and chair armrest, with the plant less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the chair and the arrangement of books and lamp on the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the books' spines, the plant, and the lamp head-on.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the chair positioned behind the desk, with the lamp, books, and plant arranged for easy access from the front.
